description_long: This is a stylized adult figure dressed in a futuristic outfit with metallic green armor elements on the forearms, waist, shins, and boots. The person wears a fitted jacket with armored cuffs and a high collar, exposing the midriff, and loose, baggy pants tucked into armored boots. The figure's hands are extended outward in a T-pose, and the head is covered with medium-length, straight hair. The face is partially obscured by a high-tech mask or respirator, suggesting a sci-fi or cyberpunk theme. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a blend of fabric and hard armor components.
description: A futuristic adult figure in a high-tech armored outfit with a mask and baggy pants, standing in a T-pose. The design features metallic green armor and a sleek, modern aesthetic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the figure, highlighting the mask, hair, and the layered armor on the arms and legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the exposed midriff, symmetrical armor, and the full design of the jacket and pants.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the profile, mask, and the contours of the armor and clothing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the jacket, pants, and the armored boots, with hair covering the upper back.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic armored jacket, baggy pants, and high-tech boots with a face mask accessory
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
